dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.overviewDescription: High-level snapshot of historical consumption and cost based on uploaded distributor reports.
dashboard.trendsDescription: Long-term consumption patterns derived from uploaded historical reports.
dashboard.usagePatternsDescription: Derived behavioral insights from historical consumption data (not real-time monitoring).
dashboard.anomaliesDescription: Detection of unusual consumption behavior compared to historical baselines.
dashboard.recommendationsDescription: Small changes based on how you've been using energy. Nothing drastic — just things that could quietly lower your bill.
dashboard.noAnomalies: No anomalies detected in the last 90 days.

recommendations.noRecommendations: No recommendations right now — consumption looks normal. Check back after the next forecast run.

suggestion.notFound: Suggestion not found or no longer active.

analytics.consumptionPatternsDescription: When and which days you consume the most energy.
analytics.touBreakdownDescription: How your consumption distributes across 2.0TD tariff periods. Shifting usage from P1 to P3 directly lowers your bill.
analytics.monthlyTrendsDescription: Month-by-month consumption and cost from uploaded distributor reports.
analytics.weatherImpactDescription: Monthly consumption alongside average temperature. Peaks reveal how heating and cooling drive your energy use.

reports.title: Reports
reports.noReportsDescription: Generate a report to analyse a specific period.
reports.selectPeriodDescription: Choose a date range to analyse. The report will include consumption patterns, time-of-use breakdown, and actionable recommendations.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your homes and tariff details.
settings.name: Name
settings.tariffHint: Leave blank to keep current values. Power rates default to CNMC 2.0TD regulated rates.
settings.noHomes: No homes found. Run a sync first.

upload.title: Upload
upload.selectDistributor: Select your distributor below to continue with the upload process.
upload.upNextDescription: Once this countdown is done, a dialog will pop up to take you to the client portal to download your consumption report. Look at the guide if you need some help!
upload.guideDescription: Here's a step by step guide on how to get your consumption report from {distributor}.
upload.noGuide: No guide available for this distributor yet.
upload.dropFiles: Drop your files here or click to upload

user.newHomesTitle: {count, plural, one {New home found} other {# new homes found}}
user.newHomesDescription: {count, plural, one {Give it a friendly name so you can identify it in the app.} other {Give them friendly names so you can identify them in the app.}}
